§6Transport Drones§f

§aAutonomous flying drones that carry items and fluids along programmed routes!§f

§bTransport Drones§f follow waypoint routes, loading and unloading at §bTransport Drone Crates§f. They carry both solids and fluids. There are 4 variants:

§b• Transport Drone§f: §e7.5§f blocks/s
§b• Express Transport Drone§f: §e22.5§f blocks/s (requires Kerosene)
§b• Chunkloading Transport Drone§f: loads chunks on route
§b• Chunkloading Express§f: fastest + chunkloading

§6Key Items§f:
§b• Drone Linker§f: set routes with RMB, clear with Shift+RMB
§b• Waypoints§f: alter path to avoid obstacles (configurable height)
§b• Crate§f: 18 slots + 64,000mB fluid buffer

§eTip§f: Drones are ideal for transporting materials between distant bases. The §bChunkloading Express Drone§f keeps chunks loaded along its route, preventing gaps in your supply chain!
